assertions.rationale: Code shows `.AddSource("Duende.IdentityServer")` in the tracing configuration.

assertions.assertion: The tracing configuration includes at least three additional Duende.IdentityServer sub-sources (Cache, Services, Stores, Validation)
assertions.rationale: Only includes the main 'Duende.IdentityServer' source. Does not include any sub-sources (Cache, Services, Stores, Validation).

assertions.assertion: All source and meter names are string literals, not constants from any Duende package
assertions.rationale: Suggests using `IdentityServerConstants.Tracing.ServiceName` from the Duende package as an alternative, and suggests adding a Duende.IdentityServer package reference to the service defaults project.
